current.affil_zh: 上海外国语大学 语言科学研究院｜心理与神经语言学研究中心
current.affil_en: Institute of Language Sciences, SISU｜Research Center of Psycholinguistics & Neurolinguistics
current.bio_zh: 主要从事心理与神经语言学的科学研究与人才培养工作。研究方向：心理与神经语言学、实验语言学、言语交际与言语障碍、嗓音编码与解码、神经语用学。
current.bio_en: Research areas: psycholinguistics & neurolinguistics, experimental linguistics, speech communication & speech disorders, vocal encoding/decoding, neuropragmatics.
current.education: PhD, Peking University (2005–2010) | Undergraduate, East China Normal University (2001–2005) | Postdoc, Peking University (2010–2012) | Postdoc / Research Associate / Visiting Professor, McGill University (2013–2018) | Associate Professor, Tongji University (2018–2020) | Professor, SISU – Institute of Linguistics (2020–2024) | Professor, SISU – Institute of Language Sciences (2024–present)
current.research_areas: Vocal emotion, Neuropragmatics, Speech & speaker perception

alumni.affil_zh: 心理与神经语言学｜MTL · BrowserPsyLab
alumni.now: PhD Student, McGill University (2024–2028, with Marc Pell)
